caption: A person holds a sports trading card featuring a baseball player and the name "V. GUERRERO" in a room with a desk and various hobby equipment. The card has a signature and the numbering "11/20" visible on its surface. In the background, a man wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt sits in a chair, watching the action. On the desk, there is a white tiered stand topped with a yellow box and a black electronic device. The background features a colorful mat with palm tree illustrations and the logos "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" displayed on the screen. As the scene progresses, the person's hand moves the card out of the frame to the left, leaving the man and the desk equipment as the primary focus of the shot.
